properties.remark: SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT REPORTED ROOF OFF OF BARN...TRAILER TURNED UPSIDE DOWN...POWER LINES AND POLES KNOCKED DOWN IN WESTERN STERLING COUNTY.

COLEMAN COUNTY LAW...FIRE...STORM SPOTTERS...AND EMERGENCY MANAGER REPORTED WIDESPREAD WIND DAMAGE ACROSS THE CITY. NUMEROUS TREES...POWER LINES...AND POLES WERE KNOCKED DOWN BY THE HIGH WIND. POWER WAS OUT ACROSS THE CITY.
A STORM SPOTTER REPORTED A ROOF BLOWN OFF A MOTEL IN CROSS PLAINS.

THERE WERE NUMEROUS CALLS DUE TO ARCING...DOWNED LINES AND TREE LIMBS ACROSS THE WESTERN PART OF ABILENE. THE DOWNED POWER LINES ALSO RESULTED IN POWER OUTAGES.
